headline: Browser-side security primitives broke out as enterprise AI deployment widened across financial services this quarter.
body: A cluster of web sandboxing techniques entered as new outliers, with Content Security Policy, sandboxed iframe, and app marketplace architecture all breaking out, pointing to growing attention on isolating AI-generated and third-party app code. Enterprise deployment advanced in parallel: large banks moved Claude into production across their organizations, and NVIDIA pushed transaction foundation models for financial intelligence. Privacy-oriented techniques rotated, with privacy-preserving inference weakening even as encrypted reasoning held a high ratio, while inverse graphics and 3D reconstruction faded against fresh entrants in Gaussian splatting and linear inverse problems. France's move off Palantir toward a domestic provider signaled continued pressure on foreign AI infrastructure dependence.

cited_items.title: France to ditch Palantir's AI data tools in favour of domestic provider
Build Your Own Transaction Foundation Model for Financial Intelligence
